tasks.name: Log in and set the nearest café within 5 miles as your favorite store
tasks.description: Sign in to an existing customer account, search for café locations by ZIP code, and set the store with the smallest distance value that is 5.0 miles or less as the favorite store.
steps: Navigate to the coffee shop website homepage.
Click the "Log In" button in the top-right corner of the header.
In the email field, type "demo.user1@example.com".
In the password field, type "CoffeeDemo!123".
Click the primary "Log In" button on the form.
Open the main navigation and click on the "Stores" or "Find a Store" link.
In the location search field, type the ZIP code "94103" and submit the search using the search button.
In the list of store results showing distance in miles, identify the store with the smallest distance value that is 5.0 miles or less and click that store's name or "View Details" link.
On the selected store’s detail page, click the "Set as Favorite Store" button.

tasks.name: Create a new customer account and access the account dashboard
tasks.description: Register a new customer account using a specific email and password, complete the sign-up form, and end on the logged-in account dashboard for that new user.
steps: Navigate to the coffee shop website homepage.
Click the "Sign Up" or "Create Account" link in the header.
In the "Full Name" field, type "Jordan Sample".
In the "Email" field, type "jordan.sample01@example.com".
In the "Password" field, type "StrongCoffee!789" and type the same value into the "Confirm Password" field.
Check the checkbox to agree to the terms and conditions.
Click the main "Create Account" or "Sign Up" button at the bottom of the form.
After registration completes, click the account icon or your name in the header to open the account dashboard page.

tasks.name: Log in and schedule a medium latte pickup closest to 8:30 AM tomorrow
tasks.description: Sign in, select any medium latte, and choose a pickup time slot for tomorrow that is closest to 8:30 AM between 8:00 AM and 9:00 AM, then add it to the order.
steps: Navigate to the coffee shop website homepage.
Click the "Log In" button in the header.
In the email field, type "demo.user2@example.com" and in the password field, type "LatteLover!321".
Click the primary "Log In" button to sign in.
In the main navigation, click the "Order" or "Order Pickup" option.
If a store selection dialog appears, click the "Use Favorite Store" or select the first listed store option.
On the menu page, click the "Lattes" or "Espresso Drinks" category and then click the first latte product card listed.
On the latte product page, select the "Medium" size option and choose any available milk option (for example, click "Whole Milk").

Click the "Pick-up Time" selector, choose tomorrow’s date, and then select the available time slot between 8:00 AM and 9:00 AM that is numerically closest to 8:30 AM (for example, choose 8:30 AM if available, otherwise the nearest time), then click "Add to Order".

tasks.name: Log in and reorder the cheapest large drink from your past orders
tasks.description: Sign in, go to order history, find the past order item labeled as size Large with the lowest price, and add one of that drink to a new order.
steps: Navigate to the coffee shop website homepage.
Click the "Log In" button in the header.
Enter the email "demo.user3@example.com" and the password "HistoryFan!555" into the login form fields.
Click the "Log In" button to sign in.
Open the account menu and click the "Order History" or "Past Orders" link.
If sort options are available, use the sort dropdown to choose a sorting option that helps you scan prices (for example, select "Price: Low to High" if present).

Within the displayed past orders, look through the listed items and identify an item that is labeled with size "Large" and has the lowest price among the large-sized drinks, then click that item’s "Order Again" or "View Details" link.
On the selected drink’s detail or reorder page, ensure the size is set to "Large" and click the "Add to Order" or "Add to Cart" button once to add a single unit of that drink to a new order.

tasks.name: Log in, add a new payment card, and set it as the default
tasks.description: Sign in to your account, add a new credit card with specific last four digits, and set that new card as the default payment method in your account.
steps: Navigate to the coffee shop website homepage.
Click "Log In" in the header.
Type "demo.user4@example.com" in the email field and "BeansAndBills!202" in the password field.
Click the "Log In" button on the form.
Open the account menu and click on the "Payment Methods" or "Wallet" section.
Click the "Add New Card" button.

In the card number field, enter a test card number that ends with the digits "4242", fill in any valid future expiration date (for example, month "12" and year "2030"), and type any 3-digit CVV (for example, "123").
Click the "Save Card" button, then in the list of saved cards, click the "Set as Default" or equivalent control on the newly added card that ends with "4242".

tasks.name: Log in and redeem loyalty points for a bakery item under $5 with 4+ stars
tasks.description: Sign in, open the rewards section, filter bakery rewards, choose a bakery item priced under $5 with a rating of at least 4 stars, and redeem points for exactly one of that item.
steps: Navigate to the coffee shop website homepage.
Click the "Log In" button in the site header.
Enter "demo.user5@example.com" in the email field and "PointsPro!777" in the password field, then click "Log In".
From the account navigation, click the "Rewards" or "Loyalty" section.
If category filters are available, select the "Bakery" or "Pastries" category to show only bakery rewards.
Use available filters or sorting controls to show items with a rating of at least 4 stars (for example, apply a "4+ stars" filter or sort by rating high to low).
From the filtered bakery items, identify an item with a listed price under $5 and click that item’s card or "View Reward" link.
On the reward detail page for that item, click the "Redeem" or "Redeem for 1 Item" button to redeem points for a single unit.

tasks.name: Log in and update notification preferences to only receive SMS order updates
tasks.description: Sign in, go to notification settings, disable promotional email and push notifications, and enable only SMS notifications for order status updates.
steps: Navigate to the coffee shop website homepage.
Click the "Log In" button at the top of the page.
In the login form, type "demo.user6@example.com" as the email and "NotifyMe!444" as the password, then click "Log In".
Open the account menu and click the "Settings" or "Notification Preferences" option.
In the email notifications section, toggle off or uncheck options for promotional or marketing emails while leaving order-related email options as currently set.
In the push notifications section, toggle off or uncheck all push notification options.
In the SMS or text message section, toggle on or check only the option related specifically to order updates or order status messages.
Scroll to the bottom of the notification settings page and click the "Save Preferences" or "Save Changes" button.

tasks.name: Log in and change your account password using the current password
tasks.description: Sign in with your existing password, navigate to security settings, and change your password from the current value to a new specified value without using any external email or SMS verification.
steps: Navigate to the coffee shop website homepage.
Click "Log In" in the header area.
Enter the email "demo.user7@example.com" and the current password "OldBrew!111" in the login form fields, then click the "Log In" button.
Open the account or profile menu and click on the "Security" or "Password" settings option.
In the "Current Password" field, type "OldBrew!111".
In the "New Password" field, type "NewEspresso!222" and type the same value into the "Confirm New Password" field.
Click the "Save Password" or "Update Password" button.
Use the account menu to log out, then click "Log In" again and enter "demo.user7@example.com" as the email and "NewEspresso!222" as the password, and click "Log In" to sign in with the new password.
